top_signals.title: Iran says ‘many issues’ resolved but warns peace deal with US not imminent
top_signals.summary: Diplomats say both sides want an agreement but talks between warring parties remain tenuous
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: GMS Week 21 – PASSAGE OPENS, WINDOW CLOSES
top_signals.summary: The Week 20 “stalemate holds” thesis has been materially challenged by the most concrete reopening signal of the war. President Trump stated on May 20 that the United States is “in the final stages of talks with Iran,” while satellite tracking data showed three supertankers transiting the Strait of Hormuz, the first such crossings since ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
